assembly_context.name: 27inch_Monitor_Assembly
assembly_context.summary: 27英寸显示器装配体，包含屏幕面板、两段式可调节立柱、圆形底座及VESA安装背板。支持左右旋转配合，立柱模拟上下调节后的固定状态。

global_coordinate_system.y_direction: Right side of Monitor (from front view)

design_rules: All dimensions in mm, convert to meters for API calls.
Use XY plane as horizontal base for all parts unless specified.
Ensure concentricity for all cylindrical connections.
Screen panel is fixed relative to bracket; rotation is simulated by bracket orientation.

instances.name: Stand Base Instance
instances.placement_notes: Fixed at global origin. Bottom face on XY plane.

part.name: Stand Base
part.function: Provides stable foundation for the monitor stand.
part.shape: Circular disk with flat top and bottom faces. Centered on Z-axis.

faces.name: base_top_face
faces.purpose: Mating surface for outer tube bottom.

axes.name: base_center_axis
axes.purpose: Central vertical axis for concentric mating.

assembly_relation_notes: Top face mates with Outer Tube bottom face.
standalone_modeling_instructions: Sketch circle diameter 250mm on XY plane centered at origin.
